signals.headline: VP Vance's Failed Iran Negotiations and Orbán Campaign Defeat | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
VP Vance's Failed Iran Negotiations and Orbán Campaign Defeat | YES | HIGH confidence**
Vice President JD Vance's diplomatic mission to negotiate with Iran in Islamabad collapsed without an agreement[3]. Simultaneously, Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orbán—whom Vance had traveled to campaign for—suffered a crushing election defeat, losing to Péter Magyar[3][4]. These dual failures represent signi

signals.headline: House Impeachment Vote Against President Trump | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
House Impeachment Vote Against President Trump | YES | HIGH confidence**
The U.S. House of Representatives conducted a historic floor debate and vote on articles of impeachment against President Donald Trump on April 14, with the proceedings broadcast live[2]. This represents only the third presidential impeachment in American history[2].
matched_markets: Will Trump say "Discombobulator" or "Discombobulated" in April?

signals.headline: Growing Youth Voter Discontent with Middle East Policy | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Growing Youth Voter Discontent with Middle East Policy | YES | HIGH confidence**
Vice President JD Vance acknowledged at a Turning Point USA event that young voters "don't love" the current Middle East policy[1]. Political analysts note Republicans face "diminished turnout and diminished support" partly due to increased discontent compared to a year ago[1].
